name: Changsha Jingjia Microelectronics Co., Ltd.
summary: Changsha Jingjia Microelectronics Co., Ltd. engages in designing, manufacturing, and selling electronic products. The company's principal products include graphics processing products and small-sized specialized radar. Its graphics processing products include products of graphics processing modules, graphics processing chips, ruggedized monitors, ruggedized storage products, and ruggedized computers; and microwave RF and signal processing, and components, etc. Changsha Jingjia Microelectronics Co., Ltd. was founded in 2006 and is based in Changsha, China.
